---
name: Hardware validation result
about: Share a backend or recovery validation result from real hardware
title: "[hardware] "
labels: hardware, evidence
assignees: ""
---

## Setup
Describe the board, medium, firmware, and wiring.

## Test scope
List the scenarios you ran, including power-loss or failure-injection coverage.

## Results
Summarize what passed, what failed, and any deviations from the documented contract.

## Artifacts
Link logs, photos, logic analyzer captures, or benchmark output.
